overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a caped character running through a foggy, rain-slicked urban plaza at night, transitioning into a narrow alley between modern buildings. The environment features wet cobblestone surfaces, artificial street lighting, and atmospheric haze typical of a cinematic action game.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with stairs and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: character in a long dark cape running across the wet cobblestone plaza toward a narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to building entrance
modern multi-story building with illuminated windows and red commercial signage
bright red illuminated sign visible through the fog on the distant building facade
tall street light casting yellow-white illumination through the atmospheric haze
black rectangular trash containers positioned on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a wide, foggy urban plaza at night. To the left, a wide concrete staircase ascends alongside a metal railing, while a modern glass office building with glowing windows dominates the right side. The wet cobblestone ground reflects the street lamps and distant red neon signage as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between high-rise commercial buildings

events.description: character enters narrow alleyway between buildings, leaving the open plaza behind

agents.ego_description: continuing to sprint through the confined cobblestone passage between tall buildings

entered.detail: dark building facade with horizontal window strips and metal railings
tall building with vertical slatted exterior and illuminated windows
architectural overhang or pedestrian bridge visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, enclosed alley between tall commercial buildings. The concrete stairs and trash bins of the plaza exit the frame as the character runs between the alley walls—one featuring horizontal windows and the other vertical slats. The red neon sign remains visible in the distance now centered ahead, while the wet cobblestone path continues through the foggy corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide, foggy urban plaza that gradually constricts into a narrow, enclosed alleyway. It begins with the character running across wet cobblestones, flanked by a wide concrete staircase on the left and a glowing glass office building on the right. As the character moves forward, the open plaza recedes and the concrete stairs and trash bins exit the frame, shifting the environment into a tight corridor between tall commercial buildings. The scene then tightens further as the camera follows the character between walls of horizontal windows and vertical slats, while the distant red neon signage becomes centered ahead. Finally, the movement continues through the foggy, rain-slicked alley, maintaining the atmospheric glow of the city night.
